name: profile: strict.yaml resolves to a rule set including every g-ts-001..008
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/strict.yaml" --emit-resolved 2>out.json && for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008; do grep -E "g-ts-$i" out.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL g-ts-$i not in strict profile" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
